Package org.bloomreach.forge.discovery.site.component.constants

Class DiscoveryModelKeys

java.lang.Object
org.bloomreach.forge.discovery.site.component.constants.DiscoveryModelKeys
public final class DiscoveryModelKeys extends Object
Typed string constants for every request.setModel(key, value) call made by Discovery HST components. Use these instead of inline string literals to keep the Java-side contract in sync with the TypeScript interfaces in the frontend.
